title: About the Quarterly International Investment Survey | Stats NZ
content:
## About the Quarterly International Investment Survey
21 September 2023, 10:45am
Information about taking part in the Quarterly International Investment Survey, such as why we carry out the survey, how we selected you, and how to complete the questionnaire.
We carry out this survey to collect information from New Zealand resident enterprises about their international investment. The enterprises are from the business sectors:
Combined statistics from this survey will:
- enable us to publish data for Balance of Payments and International Investment Position quarterly and annually
- help the government and business community formulate policies, and monitor and analyse performance of the economy
- be used to assess New Zealand’s economic performance and credit worthiness by international organisations like the International Monetary Fund and the World Bank, and credit-rating agencies.
The population size for this survey is approximately 4,000. Of these, we select 500 to participate in the survey. All New Zealand banks, and other businesses with significant international balance sheets are selected. These are:
- New Zealand businesses located in New Zealand that are wholly or partly foreign owned, including New Zealand branches of overseas businesses
- New Zealand businesses that have ownership interests in businesses located overseas, including their branches
- those New Zealand businesses that have financial asset and liability positions with overseas residents
- where groups of businesses are involved, the business selected to participate is normally the top New Zealand business of the group. This business will have to report for the whole New Zealand group, unless circumstances require members to report separately.
The questions included in this survey are being asked under the Data and Statistics Act 2022.
Our approach to survey compliance has more information about your legal obligation to participate in the Quarterly International Investment Survey.
The survey is carried out every quarter.

## How to complete the survey
You fill in either a paper or electronic (Excel) form.
- Contact us for survey help 26 May 2020
- Business survey information 31 July 2017
- Privacy, security, and confidentiality of survey data 20 May 2026
- Business 01 January 2017 Image: work table meeting
